metadata.description: Short prefix for resource names. Lowercase, 3-8 chars.
Azure region for all resources.
GitHub repository URL for the SWA build integration.
Branch the SWA should track.
GitHub PAT or deployment token for the SWA. Leave empty if you will configure deployment after creation.
Resource ID of the existing Foundry / Azure AI Services account hosting the hosted models.
Azure OpenAI-compatible endpoint URL for the hosted reasoning deployment. Stored in Key Vault and injected into the job.
Deployment name for the hosted reasoning model. Stored in Key Vault and injected into the job.
API version for the hosted reasoning deployment. Injected into the job as runtime config.
MAI image-generation endpoint URL for the hosted image deployment. Stored in Key Vault and injected into the job.
Deployment name for the hosted image model. Stored in Key Vault and injected into the job.
Container image to execute in the hosted daily runner job.
Trigger mode for the hosted daily runner job. Keep Manual until hosted smoke proof passes.
Cron expression for the scheduled daily runner. Azure Container Apps Jobs evaluate the schedule in UTC.
vCPU allocated to the hosted daily runner container.
Memory allocated to the hosted daily runner container.
Timeout, in seconds, for each job replica.
Retry attempts for a failed job replica before the execution fails.
Optional Azure Container Registry login server for managed-identity image pulls.
Optional resource ID of the Azure Container Registry that hosts the job image. When provided, the job identity receives AcrPull.
GitHub owner that the hosted runner will clone and push to.
GitHub repository name that the hosted runner will clone and push to.
GitHub branch that the hosted runner writes to.
GitHub App ID used by the hosted runner. Stored in Key Vault.
GitHub App installation ID used by the hosted runner. Stored in Key Vault.
GitHub App private key PEM used by the hosted runner. Stored in Key Vault.
Default git author name for hosted commits.
Default git author email for hosted commits.
Optional command executed inside the fresh clone before any commit/push step.
Optional fixed UTC run date injected into the hosted runner. Useful for hosted smoke and idempotency replay.
Optional run identifier for manual execution. Scheduled runs use runId=scheduled-{runDate}.
Trigger source for this execution: scheduled, manual-api, or manual-cli.
Whether the hosted bootstrap should push changes when the runner command mutates the clone.
Linux Functions worker runtime for the internal Clawpilot API. Keep aligned with Kyle API code at deployment time.
Flex Consumption runtime version for the internal Clawpilot API. Default is Node.js 20 for the planned JavaScript API implementation.
Maximum scale-out instance count for the Function App on Flex Consumption.
Memory size in MB for Function App instances on Flex Consumption.
Key Vault secret name containing the Phase 1 Clawpilot API key.
Optional initial value for the Clawpilot API key secret. Leave empty to avoid writing a secret from deployment; create/rotate it post-deploy with az keyvault secret set.

Built-in role assigned to the Function identity at the Container Apps Job scope. Default is Container Apps Jobs Operator, which can read and start jobs. Use Container Apps Jobs Contributor only if Kyle API code must persistently update the job definition before starting it.

containers.name: runner
containers.env: [concat(concat(createArray(createObject('name', 'HOSTED_JOB_NAME', 'value', variables('dailyJobName')), createObject('name', 'AZURE_CLIENT_ID', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities', variables('jobIdentityName')), '2023-01-31').clientId), createObject('name', 'KEY_VAULT_URL', 'value', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', variables('kvName')), '2024-04-01-preview').vaultUri), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_REASONING_ENDPOINT', 'secretRef', 'foundry-reasoning-endpoint'), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_IMAGE_ENDPOINT', 'secretRef', 'foundry-image-endpoint'), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_ENDPOINT', 'secretRef', 'foundry-endpoint'), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_REASONING_DEPLOYMENT', 'secretRef', 'foundry-reasoning-deployment'), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_REASONING_API_VERSION', 'secretRef', 'foundry-reasoning-api-version'), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_IMAGE_DEPLOYMENT', 'secretRef', 'foundry-image-deployment'), createObject('name', 'FOUNDRY_DEPLOYMENT', 'secretRef', 'foundry-deployment'), createObject('name', 'GITHUB_OWNER', 'value', parameters('githubOwner')), createObject('name', 'GITHUB_REPO', 'value', parameters('githubRepo')), createObject('name', 'GITHUB_BRANCH', 'value', parameters('githubBranch')), createObject('name', 'GIT_AUTHOR_NAME', 'value', parameters('gitAuthorName')), createObject('name', 'GIT_AUTHOR_EMAIL', 'value', parameters('gitAuthorEmail')), createObject('name', 'HOSTED_RUNNER_COMMAND', 'value', parameters('hostedRunnerCommand')), createObject('name', 'PYTHONUNBUFFERED', 'value', '1'), createObject('name', 'PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE', 'value', '1'), createObject('name', 'HOSTED_PUSH_CHANGES', 'value', if(parameters('hostedPushChanges'), 'true', 'false'))), if(variables('hasGitHubAppConfig'), createArray(createObject('name', 'GITHUB_APP_ID', 'secretRef', 'github-app-id'), createObject('name', 'GITHUB_APP_INSTALLATION_ID', 'secretRef', 'github-app-installation-id'), createObject('name', 'GITHUB_APP_PRIVATE_KEY', 'secretRef', 'github-app-private-key')), createArray())), if(not(empty(parameters('hostedRunDateOverride'))), createArray(createObject('name', 'RUN_DATE_UTC', 'value', parameters('hostedRunDateOverride'))), createArray()), createArray(createObject('name', 'RUN_ID', 'value', if(not(empty(parameters('hostedRunId'))), parameters('hostedRunId'), '')), createObject('name', 'TRIGGER_SOURCE', 'value', parameters('hostedTriggerSource'))))]

metadata.description: Name of the existing Foundry / Azure AI Services account.
Object ID of the principal (managed identity) to grant access to.
Built-in role definition GUID.
Name of the existing Azure Container Registry.
Object ID of the principal (managed identity) to grant access to.
Built-in role definition GUID.
